expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: Without the skill, the response proceeds to deliver a full 10-point generic audit rather than gating on the actual page content — it lists questions but still provides the full audit without requiring answers first.

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: The response does not invent specific page copy; it provides a generic checklist of common pricing page issues rather than auditing fabricated content.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response provides a detailed 10-point 'General Pricing Page Audit' checklist, presented as a generic framework the user can apply, with a closing note to share the page for specific feedback.
